title: AI Guild Master
description: A Phaser.js browser game where NPCs train based on character dreams, guided by Google Gemini AI. Features an AI controller that automates Pokémon-style game mechanics using the Gemini API for intelligent NPC decision-making.
highlights: Gemini API integration for NPC decision-making
Phaser.js game engine for browser-based gameplay
Python AI controller for game automation
Character dream system drives NPC training

title: Jewel Smash Game
description: A tile-matching game originally built in Python with PyGame, then ported to run on STM32 microcontroller hardware. Demonstrates cross-platform game logic from PC to embedded systems.
highlights: Same game logic running on PC and embedded hardware
STM32 microcontroller port from Python original

title: Christmas New Game Idea 2025
description: An exploratory game project built with the Godot engine using GDScript, with Python integration. A creative sandbox for experimenting with game design concepts.

title: InnoPort Board Game
description: A complete board and card game design with professionally crafted physical assets. Includes a Tabletop Simulator mod for digital play, with all cards designed in Affinity Designer. Protected by an IP agreement with Unplugged Studio.
highlights: Complete board/card game with physical assets
Tabletop Simulator mod for digital playtesting
Affinity Designer for all card assets

title: Intern Life 2024
description: A ReadTheDocs documentation site chronicling internship experiences from 2024-2025. Also involved setting up websites using Wix and WordPress platforms, covering product setup and branding.
highlights: Wix and WordPress website setup experience

title: Calculator Project
description: A Python calculator built with pytest testing, using the uv package manager. Demonstrates test-driven development practices and clean CLI tool design.
highlights: uv package manager for dependency management

title: Greeting Project
description: A simple Python greeting script forked from an instructor's repository. A foundational programming exercise demonstrating version control and collaborative development.

title: C Programming & Embedded Systems
description: University coursework in C programming across IERG 3810, 3830, and 3842, focusing on ARM/STM32 microcontrollers and embedded systems development.

title: IERG 4210 Web Project
description: Web technologies coursework covering modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript development. A full-stack web project demonstrating frontend and backend integration.

title: Infotainment Video Production
description: A COMM3930B infotainment production project encompassing video production, script writing, and content creation. Additional video editing work includes fine cuts, voice-over recordings, and subtitling.
highlights: Infotainment video production from concept to delivery

title: Film Society 「映徒」
description: Founding cabinet member of the CUHK Film Society 「映徒」. Responsibilities included event planning, poster design, film screenings, budgeting, and membership management for the university film community.
highlights: Founding cabinet member of CUHK Film Society
Event planning and film screening organization

title: Pixel Art & Graphic Design
description: A diverse collection of creative visual work including character sprites, UI assets, logos, posters, and card designs created with Aseprite, Affinity Designer, and Photoshop.
highlights: Character sprites and UI asset creation
Multi-tool workflow: Aseprite, Affinity Designer, Photoshop

title: D&D Campaign: Empire Ants
description: A custom Dungeons & Dragons campaign 'Empire Ants' with detailed worldbuilding, character sheets, and narrative design. Showcases creative writing and TTRPG content creation skills.
